M-025.NAME: device-audit-log
M-025.owns: durable audit trail for device lifecycle, anti-abuse detection, soft auto-rotation and degraded-mode events

exports.fn-record-device-event: Writes a stable lifecycle or anomaly event for later investigation
exports.enum-anti-abuse-events: ping_pong_abuse_detected, multi_network_abuse_detected, anti_abuse_auto_rotate_started, anti_abuse_auto_rotate_completed, anti_abuse_cooldown_skipped, anti_abuse_redis_degraded
